2MP (low poke, functions like 2MK for most characters)
Short range on frame 5 (0.924) but very rewarding if it can reach
Zangief's best 5F punish at max range (2LK conversions are weak especially if farther away)
Special move, but included for being an important long-range 5f punish (1.315 Range on frame 5, comparable to Shoto 5LK)
Extremely short range as a 5-frame punish (0.74), but more rewarding when landed
Terrible punish, but the only 5-frame option when outside of 2LP range
Punish allows the 2LK~2HK Target Combo to connect (longest range 5f punish and especially important for Modern controls)
(DL1) Jamie's best 5-frame punish once he has taken at least 1 drink
Only useful as max range Punish Counter linked into 2MK
Slightly shorter than 5LK but better follow-ups
Chun's longest 5-frame normal, short compared to most 5f punishes (may need to use 236LK instead)
JP's longest range 5f punish (among the shortest in the game)
Slightly more range than 2LP while still allowing link to 5HP
Less range than 5LP (4f startup), but links to 5HP on Punish Counter
Kimberly's shortest light punish, but links into 5HP on Punish Counter for stronger conversions

tables.source_section: Longest Punish Option at Each Frame Disadvantage

cells: Only +4 on PC, no extra reward beyond Light chains
At meterless max range, can only cancel into Headbutt or MP Hands
At meterless max range, can only cancel into MK Tiger Nexus; slightly closer gives 5LK > MP Uppercut
At meterless max range, can only cancel into LP Dimachaerus; slightly closer gives 2MP > LK Quadriga, or 5MP~MP when closer
At meterless max range, can only cancel into LP/MP Flash Knuckle or link 5MK; slightly closer gives 2MK
At meterless max range, can only cancel into Electricity or MP Roll; slightly closer gives 5MK
At meterless max range, can only link 5MK or cancel into LK Eagle Spike or LP/MP Spinning Mixer; slightly closer gives 2MK
Links to 2MP even at max range (2LP punish is more rewarding if closer)
At meterless max range, can only cancel into any Rond-point (236K) or LK/MK Dégagé (214K); slightly closer gives 5MP
Links to 5MP/2MP/2MK even at max range
Links to 5MK even at max range (a direct cancel to MP Stribog also works well vs. extended hurtbox punish)
Links to 5HP/2MK even at max range
Links to 2MK/4MP even at max range
Links to 5MP/2MP even at max range
At max range, cancels to MK/HK Sobat, links to 2HP/2MK, or chains to 5LP~MK~MK; must be close for a more substantial punish
Links to 4HP/2HK even at max range; direct cancel to HK Flash Kick is often easier/better
Links to 5MP/2MK even at max range (2LP punish is more rewarding into 5HP if closer)
Links to 2MK even at max range (2LP punish is more rewarding into 5HP if closer)
Not cancelable; at ranges where 2LP is required over 5LP, Ed can only link into 5LK~LK~LK 5LP has 0.92 Range; can always link into 2MP, and gets 5MP~HP at farther ranges than 2LP
Links to 5MK/2MK even at max range (2LP punish is more rewarding into 2HP if closer)
Links to 5MK/2MK/2HK even at max range
Links to 5MK/2HK even at max range; 2MP/5MP require closer range punish
Links to 2MK even at max range
Links to 5MP/2MK~2HK even at max range
Links to 5MK/2MK/2HK even at max range
Links to 2MK/6MP even at max range
At meterless max range, can only cancel into LP Yoga Flame; slightly closer gives 4MK > MP Yoga Flame
Links to 2MK even at max range (into LK Spire / HP Tomahawk / Windclad HK Spire)
